LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ALLAN KAPLAN AND I/PRO CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM MAR-26-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-17-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302.
